fees_and_eligibility.overview: Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Srikakulam Campus - RGUKT offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG level. The college is mainly concerned with stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Srikakulam Campus - RGUKT courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies, Srikakulam Campus - RGUKT courses stands around INR 2,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Advanced Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is another home to us.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students to join this program is a minimum of 560 marks, and the packages offered in my college placements are a minimum of 6 LPA. The top recruitment companies are Wipro and Cognizant. My college also provides internships. The roles offered by my college are also many.
review_content.Infrastructure: The mess food is good to eat, medical facilities are here, and they constructed the hospital. At my college, sports and games are also highly participated in. They selected for state and national tournaments, also.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very friendly to work with us, they are highly qualified and have a lot of knowledge, and the teaching quality is very good. It makes students industry-ready. Exams are difficult, but if you prepare well, you can attempt anything easily. In my college, the faculty are the best faculty who have done well in Ph.D.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Advanced Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: As I said, the college has some disadvantages because of its new construction.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage of this college is above 80%. As per my knowledge, the recent placement of a girl is 19 LPA, and 86 female students have been placed in Infosys. Around 17 students have been placed in a company called Moship. Every year, there are a few students with internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty are very experienced, with around 15+ years of experience, and a few are new and guest lecturers. We have limited classes, so we only have a half-day college. We have Wi-Fi and a library with many books. The food is good; new caterers have taken over, and it was nice.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Last year we got very good placements, and as I said, we can say 50-50 about the college.

review_content.Placements: Around 70 percent of students are placed every year. As per my knowledge, last year around 2 students got 23 LPA, and a few more got around 15 LPA. Companies like MosChip, a Visakhapatnam-based company, Infosys, etc., visit the campus. Around 30 percent of 4th-year students get placed in internships in my course, mainly in SQL, Head roles, and a few in data analysis.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good, but the boys’ hostel has limited rooms, so boys have to share a little bit. We have all sports fields.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Advanced Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college but needs improvement.

review_content.Placements: More than 70% of students are placed from our course. At the same time, the remaining are planning for the GATE exam, MBA, or studying abroad. Recently, 86 girls from my college were placed at Infosys, and we got placements in Microchip. A few companies come every year, and our placement office brings good companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is established a few years ago, so speaking of infrastructure, it is average with limited classrooms and limited hostel rooms, which need improvement. We have Wi-Fi and laptops provided by the college. The food is good, as the management changed the cook. We have a ground for cricket, kabaddi, and badminton.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I prefer to join this college.

review_content.Placements: As far as my aspect, placements are good in this university according to the mechanical branch. They provide better opportunities to core branches as compared to other branches. My positions, such as quality check and design management, are offered to the mechanical branch.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good infrastructure, and it also needs improvement. They provide enough facilities to students. It is much better than many private universities. Coming to the hostel and mess, it is good and can provide a good environment for living.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good facilities, infrastructure, and teachers.

review_content.Placements: Still, there is no placement in our college but as the 4th year students relocate to our campus so the placements are in progress. No student is placed. 70% to 80% of students are doing internships. Students are mostly doing assistant engineering roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good resources. We have Wi-Fi facility and labs with equipments. We also have clean and good classrooms. There is a common library, where books related to our department are available. There are above average facilities in hostels. Quality of food is average. Canteen is available. Medical facility is available for medical needs. Tournaments are conducted in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities, infrastructure, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: We have good resources. We have Wi-Fi facility and labs with equipments. We also have clean and good classrooms. There is a common library, where books related to our department are available. There are above average facilities in hostels. Quality of food is average. Canteen is available. reviews.review_heading: Good college. It’s worth your money, and it will take some time to become an excellent college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average, and some are very excellent. If we collaborate with them, they can guide you for placement. The infrastructure is good, but it’s a new college, so some parts are under construction. The hostels are good, but there is a little rush in rooms; for example, 3-member rooms have been allocated to 4 members in the boys' hostel. Facilities in the hostel are good, but the food is average. There is a canteen, but it is expensive. The college is good for sports, and even league even...

reviews.review_heading: This college is only good.
reviews.review_text: My hostel is very good and very strong due to the number one cement, but everyday once clean every block with detergent. My block has five blocks with only boys and side block is girls' block. It depends on the course of every group.

reviews.review_heading: I prefer to join this institution.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure in this institution, it is well-equipped with digital classrooms and moderately equipped laboratories. They also provide high-speed Wi-Fi for students and faculty members for educational purposes. Coming to the hostel, it is okay, and the mess food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but it must improve the standards and management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. The organisation is doing its best to provide all of that infrastructure. But sometimes they fail to achieve it (from a student's point of view). I think it's more like school environment. The hostel facilities are okay, not bad. The food quality is not good. Mess does not provide the food, they told us in the paper. Canteen is somewhat good. Medical facilities are poor. Sports and games are average.

reviews.review_heading: You can have more fun at the campus.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other universities. Here, the rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, mess, and all are maintained with air conditioning and everyday cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: Better to join this university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure available here is far better than that of other universities. The rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, and mess are maintained with air conditioning and cleaned daily.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied as it has low fees.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure available here is far better compared to other Universities. Here, the rooms are neatly maintained with workers cleaning every day. All the classrooms, library, and mess are maintained with air conditioning and daily cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: I prefer to join this institution.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide Wi-Fi facility in classrooms, academic blocks, as well as hostel rooms. At present, Wi-Fi in hostel rooms is only provided for girls. They provide cots and cotton mattresses, and every room contains a tube light and fans. They contain modern bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the Rajiv Gandhi University of Knowledge Technologies.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. Labs are not well-equipped, but classrooms are neat and clean. The facilities are not very nice, and the food is not so good compared to other universities. Medical facilities are well-equipped.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer:
The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.
The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Shankara Group of Institution - Shankara Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is not good for placement and education.

content.Placements: The BCA placement rate is zero percent, with very few students placed with a 10k salary. Students get upset during admission times because the faculty at this college is rude and unhelpful. They seem to be cheating students, and no top IT companies visit the college, so no one gets an internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is okay, but the mess is very bad. The food is only for survival. If you join this college hostel, your diet will suffer. There is no cleanliness in the hostel kitchen, and sometimes flies come into the mess's food. The canteen is always closed. This college is more for passing time, for those who want to play on the ground and don't want to study.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of JECRC University.

content.Placements: No companies come here for placements. 1 or 2 companies came at our time for marketing roles, and no one sits in placement for this role. Once Infosys came here for recruitment, but don't know when. So, for placement purposes, it is not good at all. For taking a college degree, prefer this.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. Not like very big colleges. Yes, but good because its structure is like an old Haveli. The campus is surrounded by greenery, which is very peaceful, and having lunch there is a very good experience. Classes are okay. Space is enough. A decent infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Not so worthy to get into it because of poor placement.

content.Placements: For my duration in college from 2014 to 2018, only one company came for campus placement, Avaids Technology where I got placed. For other branches, very few company visit the college for placement. At my time there were no such internship programme. You could only visit NPTEL website for education and Certificate programme by IIT.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, hostel facility is available for both boys and girls. There is a separate water tap available at the entry point to the hostel. Food quality is moderate and different food is prepared every day. The canteen is good where you get paties, cold drinks etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college helps you to complete your degree.

content.Placements: Around 2-3 companies came when I was in the final year, which doesn't belong to our core branch. Still, we sit in the interview, and after the final round is completed, they say this job does not suit your profile. They suggest joining in some other company. It is a time pass of full-day when any 3rd-grade company comes for campus drive.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good and looks royal. There are the best classrooms, auditorium, big ground, a great basketball and badminton court. A God Saraswati temple is also available here. There are two hostels and a big mess with very good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Students can opt for this for studying, but you should study on your own.

content.Placements: Almost 10 to 20% of the students got placed in our course. In our course, the highest salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 1 LPA. HCL and Havells were top recruiting companies at that time. About 30% of the students got an internship in companies like Jio, HCL, Eicher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. Our college has a very good stock of books in the library, and there are also computer labs, auditorium, transport facility, well-connected Wi-Fi facility, canteens and workshops. All types of games facilities are available here. Cricket and football ground is good for students who like cricket.

reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi facility. Labs are good for the 1st year students. There are no proper labs for the students of 2nd, 3rd and 4th years. There are no medical facilities. The canteen was non-functional for most of the time in a year. Limited items like a cold drink and chips were available. Food served in the mess is poor. There is no proper hygiene and cleanliness. When we reported this issue to the director, he said that the students have come here to study but not to eat d...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are not that good, and the facilities provided are worse.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good but is not well utilised. There are nice and clean classrooms, and our college also has a large playground. The college doesn't provide you with many facilities. The canteen is just for namesake, and it doesn't offer any food at all. Hostel rooms are the same, but the quality of food served is quite low.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements are offered by the college. All the faculty are well-qualified and knowledgeable.
reviews.review_text: The college is located in a very good place near Delhi-Jaipur highway. College infrastructure is very good and very modern. All types of sports grounds are available on the college campus. Overall, the infrastructure of the college is very good. Several companies visit the college and offer the best salary for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college deserves to be given a chance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is more than enough but is being used carelessly. The classrooms are big and clean, and labs are loaded with instruments. There is also large space available for cricket and football. There is a basketball court as well. The food is just above average.

reviews.review_heading: I think this college is the worst college in our area.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is better but not good. The cleaning condition is not good. The condition of blackboards is too poor, and no one projector is available in our college for our powerpoint presentation. They operate the full college in just a single building. They use computers for just only online purposes.

reviews.review_heading: If you want to spoil your future get admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The indoor and outdoor playgrounds are present. There is an auditorium, where the college functions take place. There are laboratories, but the equipment present in the labs are not working and are not functioning. We don't perform even a single experiment. But if some expenditure is made upon the labs then the equipment can function well.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the placement and the university.
reviews.review_text: The building of the college and hostel is good. The classrooms are average. The labs are not good, and no equipment and machines are in the working condition. The lab assistant is good and will teach and show the experiment, otherwise, the only theory will be thought for the students.

college_info.college_name: School of Engineering and Technology, IFTM University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: School of Engineering and Technology, IFTM University was founded in 2002. It is a private institute and is located in Moradabad, Uttar Pradesh. School of Engineering and Technology, IFTM University courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. School of Engineering and Technology, IFTM University offers a total of 10 courses in stream such as Engineering. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech and the total seat intake for the available courses is 330. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Mechanical Engineering. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,74,000 to 3,68,000 and the average median salary is around INR 2,10,000. Apart from this, the School of Engineering and Technology, IFTM University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    The salary for an entry-level job is INR 30,000 to 45,000 and above per month. ECE graduates earn well after gathering experience for one-two year. Moreover, professionals with industrial experience stand out in terms of skills and can earn INR 8-12 Lacs per annum. To get good salary, ECE graduates should have a clear concept of designing, Analog circuit, VLSI, Microprocessors, Antennas, Network Analysis, and Programming.

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good as there are no proper machines available and many of them are too old to use. Otherwise, on an average, it is okay you can say. There are chances that the authorities are planning to improve the standard as time would tell us how keen are they.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the course, but the infrastructure is average.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 8.14 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2.3 LPA and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Zoho, HCL, Capgemini, etc., visit our campus. Top roles offered are in IT networking, medical coding, and other IT sector work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and libraries are good. The hostel facilities are average. The quality of the food in the hostel was average. Mess, canteen, all sports, and games are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Medical Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Overall experience was not too bad.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not bad. Few students got placed in low recruiting companies. Highly reputed companies do not visit the college. They cheat in placements. They make students sit for the interview and then after sometime the recruiter doesn’t respond.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infra of the college is not bad. Wi-Fi is really bad. Classrooms are not great and library is boring. Hostel is one of the worst and they do not provide safety for the students. Students are good in behavior.
review_content.Faculty: The college provides exams manually but teaching quality is not good. They do not have experienced teachers. Students only get knowledge, they do not become industry ready. Teachers are not friendly.

admission_process.title: Sengunthar College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sengunthar College of Engineering admission isentrance-basedfor PG andmerit-basedfor UG programmes. Candidates can apply for admission toBTech and MTechprogramme atSengunthar College of Engineering. Moreover, Sengunthar College of Engineering admission to MTech is done based onGATE/ CEETA PG exam, followed by the counselling process. However, for BTech, candidates can directly appear inTNEA Counsellingthrough their past academic merit. Read on the article for more details around Sengunthar College of Engineering admission 2025.
Tabulated below are the course-wise detailed eligibility and selection criteria related to Sengunthar College of Engineering course admission 2025:
- Pass Class 12 from a recognised board
- Cut off mark = 200 (100 for Mathematics and 100 for Physics + Chemistry)
Know more aboutSengunthar College of Engineering courses
Check below the detailed steps for the admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

Sengunthar College of Engineering applications are subjective to the process for certain accepting entrance exams and counselling rounds for UG and PG courses. Check below for UG and PG courses applications:
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Sengunthar College of Engineering admission is both merit and entrance-based for UG and PG courses, respectively. For BTech & BTech LE programmes, candidates are offered direct admission based on their past academic merit of Class 12/ Diploma. However, for MTech admission, candidates need to qualify for either GATE or CEETA PG entrance exam.
Step 3: Counselling Process
After the commencement of the selection rounds, candidates need to appear in the counselling process conducted by Anna University for BTech and MTech courses. Check the following details:
Step 4: Final Admission
After the final seat allotment through the respective counselling process, the selected candidates must pay a certain amount of course fee to confirm their seats.

answer.text: Varaprasad Reddy Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.MCACandidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.
MCA

Candidate must have passed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with Mathematics as one of the subject at Intermediate or Degree level with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

review_summary.college_name: Varaprasad Reddy Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Varaprasad Reddy Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide good placements. Placements were good in 2015. They are not providing good placement opportunities after covid.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is not good. Computer labs are neither good nor well-maintained. The bus facility is not available in our college. They demand high charges.
content.Faculty: Our department has around 2-3 faculty members. They conduct mid-exams. They don't provide good knowledge. Our department should have around 12 faculty members.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college was once upon a time excellent but now, it is not good.

content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed in our course. The lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 7.5 LPA in our course. Wipro, Infosys, and other MNCs are recruiting companies for our course. About 30% of students got internships from our course in Infosys and MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has free Wi-Fi arrangement, labs, classrooms, hostel, library, sports ground, good faculty, long college, high-security system, etc., Hostel food is good and medical facilities are not available and also not good. Sports are also not good and they are not preferring sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good, our college celebration is big.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Cognizant, ITC, Capgemini, etc., visit our college for placements. Our college also provides internships for the students who permission well in academics and trains them to get selected for the internship.
content.Infrastructure: The quality of food services in the mess and canteen is good and is as per the price. Our college provides good facilities likes, a library, etc. As far as the infrastructure of our college is concerned classrooms are air-conditioned and spacious. Our college has everything like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports, games etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Center for PG Studies -VTU is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Its cheap in college fees as compared to others private colleges, there is a free space with garden.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements offered by any companies to this college, and they only Provide pool campus drives, and they announce it very late. Just two days before they put it on the notices board. The internship is a myth here. They suggest only paid internship that too from the locality and they are interrelated and, they won't teach students well at the internship and it behaves like training institution. Only MBA placement is good, even though they bring BPO and Tech support companies with less package just for publicity they do this drama just to show that we have few companies here for placements, and to make hoardings for advertising purpose. The placement officer is not available at the office, and it is always locked. Randomly they put on the notice board, and most of them are not aware of everyone. They started placement from last year, but college started in the year 2008. Though we have lack of placements, I hope our juniors may get placements. I think the only drawback about this college is placements, for MCA and M.Tech courses even though teaching is average. It is a government college, no one cares students like private college faculty. The faculty members are also not good, some of the faculty don't communicate in English.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The infrastructure of the college is very good, clean and without violence.

review_content.Placements: About placements, there were only two companies which came this year. Some of the students got placed into it. The salary package was 3 lakhs. One company was Vyom Labs Pvt Ltd but I don't remember now about the other company. Roles offered by the companies are technical support, BPO, developer, etc. About the internship, 30% of the students got internships from the college. The highest stipend was 7000, the lowest is 0 and the average stipend is 2000.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of VTU is fantastic. Here, all facilities are good like WiFi is there with a high speed and even LAN cables are given in every classroom and hostel room. Labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games are very good. All these facilities are available on this campus. Labs and classrooms are well-designed and comfortable. The food in the canteen is good. Hostel rooms are also very comfortable for the students. On this campus, no infrastructure problem is there. This campus is very clean, green and neat.

review_summary.college_name: Center for PG Studies -VTU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very good, and the library facilities are good.

content.Placements: Many of the students got placed in MNCs. I also got placed in a company. Around 75% of placements were provided by our college. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The companies first offer internships to the students, and later, they will offer permanent employment. Around 56% of the students who joined internships were offered the stipend of Rs. 4,500 per month. It is very useful for all the students in this college.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities like labs, classrooms, Wi-Fi and medical facilities are available in our college. Quality of food available in our canteen is very good. All the facilities are available in the hostel rooms, and the rooms are cleaned every week. I am not facing any problems in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Its cheap in college fees as compared to others private colleges, there is a free space with garden.

content.Placements: There are no placements offered by any companies to this college, and they only Provide pool campus drives, and they announce it very late. Just two days before they put it on the notices board. The internship is a myth here. They suggest only paid internship that too from the locality and they are interrelated and, they won't teach students well at the internship and it behaves like training institution. Only MBA placement is good, even though they bring BPO and Tech support companies with less package just for publicity they do this drama just to show that we have few companies here for placements, and to make hoardings for advertising purpose. The placement officer is not available at the office, and it is always locked. Randomly they put on the notice board, and most of them are not aware of everyone. They started placement from last year, but college started in the year 2008. Though we have lack of placements, I hope our juniors may get placements. I think the only drawback about this college is placements, for MCA and M.Tech courses even though teaching is average. It is a government college, no one cares students like private college faculty. The faculty members are also not good, some of the faculty don't communicate in English.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure of the college is very good, clean and without violence.

content.Placements: About placements, there were only two companies which came this year. Some of the students got placed into it. The salary package was 3 lakhs. One company was Vyom Labs Pvt Ltd but I don't remember now about the other company. Roles offered by the companies are technical support, BPO, developer, etc. About the internship, 30% of the students got internships from the college. The highest stipend was 7000, the lowest is 0 and the average stipend is 2000.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of VTU is fantastic. Here, all facilities are good like WiFi is there with a high speed and even LAN cables are given in every classroom and hostel room. Labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games are very good. All these facilities are available on this campus. Labs and classrooms are well-designed and comfortable. The food in the canteen is good. Hostel rooms are also very comfortable for the students. On this campus, no infrastructure problem is there. This campus is very clean, green and neat.

individual_reviews.course: M.Tech. in Product Design and Manufacturing - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with infrastructure need more industrial tie up.

content.Placements: Placement was not good, at all, in case of internship, college staff helped to get internship but not for all students very few staff tried their best but whole college should hep students to get internship and placement as well respective government should look in it.
content.Infrastructure: Regarding Wi-Fi, it is ATIT best good Wi-Fi and LAN connectivity for student good class room whole digital class room and furniture was best library was not upto mark need to upgrade more books and specially library staff should be well qualified need to understand the English and Hindi languages.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

Many companies visited our college to recruit the students of our senior batch. The lowest starting salary offered was Rs. 22,000 per month, and it was offered to a student named Satish from B.Com. From our batch, two girls were placed with a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month. This is a good college for every intelligent student.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our MBA department was very good. The college provided many facilities like Wi-Fi and medical facilities. Management games were held in our classroom. The college has a huge library with every book required. Every year, the college organises a sports meet, and many students participate in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and facilities. The faculty and placements are also nice.

content.Placements: The placements are nearly 40% to 50% here. There is nice personality development courses so we can get selected. The students are in good companies like HCL, Mahendra, and Tata companies are hiring students. The highest salary was offered in my batch was Rs. 40,000 per month and the lowest was Rs. 23000 per month. 70% of the students got the internship and got the stipend from Rs. 15000 per month to Rs. 8000 per month. The placement cell is very active and useful. They do all the necessary work.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi is enabled on the campus. The labs are in good condition. The library is big, and storage of books is appreciable. Medical facilities are available at the instant. There are a lot of other facilities like hostels are good, and the quality of food is very good. Sports facilities are available, and also we played a lot of games and enjoyed the atmosphere.

admission_overview.title: KC Group of Institutions, Nawanshahar Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: KC Group of Institutions has two campuses, Una and Nawanshahar. The Nawanshahar campus hosts 9 colleges specialising in nine different domains. KC Group of Institutions, Nawanshahar offers courses at the UG, PG and After 10th levels. Some of these are namely, Engineering, Pharmacy, Education, Computer Applications etc. Applications for admission to KC Group of Institutions, Nawanshahar are accepted strictly in the online mode. Admissions are mostly merit based with the university accepting Class 12 scores for the same. The fee for courses offered at the Nawanshahar campus range between INR 98,000 to INR 3.17 L. Read on to know more about the eligibility and selection criteria, The admission process, the application fees etc. at KC Group of Institutions, Nawanshahar.

The quality of my hostel is very good. The food is average but neat and clean. We have 2 mess halls, one for boys and one for girls. There are 2 canteens.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Raj Kumar Goel Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Com. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as MBA/PGDM and MCA. Raj Kumar Goel Engineering College courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Raj Kumar Goel Engineering College courses stands around INR 1,22,400 to 2,80,850.

faqs.answer: A:    Raj Kumar Goel Engineering College provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, BCA, B.Com, MBA/PGDM, MCA in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: One of my precis time is spent here.

review_content.Placements: The quality of placement in the college cannot be questioned as the college has amazing facilities to accommodate the students studying here. The university placement cell is helpful and almost provides placement to 80 to 90% of students from campus. The highest placement of this college is gone upto 42 Lacs, and the average package is 10-15 Lacs per. Among the college, the main recruiting companies are Microsoft, bajaj etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The raj Kumar Goel engineering college has total of 7 hostels available in which the 4 is for the girls who are from the outside and other 3 is for boys. The college infrastructure is awesome and it have all type of facilities available including central library, computer labs, Science labs, canteen etc. We also have the sports block where students can play the games and enjoy their hostel life. The facilities provided in the hostel is a room of two peoples in which two B.Ed two tables, two chairs and two almirah is available separately for both the students and the hostel mess facility is very hygienic which 24/7 availability of Wi-Fi connection.

reviews_list.review_title: This college is recommended to those who want a private college.

review_content.Placements: About 75-80% of students are placed in this college. College placements start from the 6th semester for students. The highest salary package offered in this college is 16.6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 4.25 LPA. Top companies which visited our campus are Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, IBM, etc.

review_summary.college_name: Raj Kumar Goel Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty and good placements in 2025.

content.Placements: The number of students present in civil engineering is 20%. The highest package is 35 LPA, the lowest package is 10 LPA, and the average package is 20 LPA. Recruiting companies are Tata Projects, Afcons Infrastructure, Shapoorji Pallonji Group, and Godrej Properties. All the students got the internship. Students are recruited to prepare a design and project plan.
content.Infrastructure: The university covers the area of 10 acres. The building was well designed and maintained. The classrooms were designed with 4.0 teaching technology and also provide Wi-Fi facilities in every class and hall. The hostel also provides good facilities like fresh food, a gym, Wi-Fi, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the staff members and the working operation.

content.Placements: The number of students who opt for this course is approximately 20%. The highest package is 20 LPA, the lowest is 10 LPA, and the average is 15 LPA. Recruiting companies include Tata Projects Limited, Sita Construction, and Hindustan Construction. The roles offered are in planning and designing infrastructure.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is well-designed. The campus is covered with Wi-Fi lanes, and the classrooms are updated with the latest technology. The library is also covered with Wi-Fi lanes. The hostel also provides a gym and Wi-Fi facilities. The food is also prepared freshly in the mess and canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: One of my precis time is spent here.

content.Placements: The quality of placement in the college cannot be questioned as the college has amazing facilities to accommodate the students studying here. The university placement cell is helpful and almost provides placement to 80 to 90% of students from campus. The highest placement of this college is gone upto 42 Lacs, and the average package is 10-15 Lacs per. Among the college, the main recruiting companies are Microsoft, bajaj etc.
content.Infrastructure: The raj Kumar Goel engineering college has total of 7 hostels available in which the 4 is for the girls who are from the outside and other 3 is for boys. The college infrastructure is awesome and it have all type of facilities available including central library, computer labs, Science labs, canteen etc. We also have the sports block where students can play the games and enjoy their hostel life. The facilities provided in the hostel is a room of two peoples in which two B.Ed two tables, two chairs and two almirah is available separately for both the students and the hostel mess facility is very hygienic which 24/7 availability of Wi-Fi connection.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is recommended to those who want a private college.

content.Placements: About 75-80% of students are placed in this college. College placements start from the 6th semester for students. The highest salary package offered in this college is 16.6 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 4.25 LPA. Top companies which visited our campus are Wipro, TCS, Cognizant, IBM, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in this college are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Games like football ground, basketball ground, and volleyball games are played in this college.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college are helpful, well qualified, and knowledgeable. They clear subject doubts very well. C programme faculty is decent in this college. You can choose the course which you want. I recommend CSE, ECE, and data science are the best. Semester exams are difficult so you have to put some effort for that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: RKGIT is more better than RKGET.

content.Placements: In our batch, only 1-2 students got placed from the college. This college this sifted into RKGIT which is the main branch of Raj Kumar Goel Engineering College, in short, I would like to say that RKGIT is better than the RKGEC which is closed at this time due to less number of students taking admission in past years.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided by our college are good. They give all their efforts to their students. The library is also good, but the labs are not perfectly open. MY friends who stay in the hostel said that the space in rooms is good as compare to RKGIT rooms hostel which

reviews.review_heading: This is the worst college, I had never been.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facilities of the college include two boys hostels, but girls hostel is located in the academic building itself. The work is in progress since 2013, and it has not been completed. Bottom line was not good. Locality is scary, and I say that it is scary, especially for the girls. The college is 300 m away from the railway line, and 2 km away from the market.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty are good but the placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available at all times. The classrooms are not very good, but average classrooms are available. The labs are good. The lab teachers are very good, and they have good knowledge. The library is nice for studying. The medical facilities are not good. The playground is very nice for playing games.

reviews.review_heading: Refuse admissions in private colleges of B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice in RKGEC. It has 3 buildings and 2 hostels. Classrooms are big and comfortable. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, has a big library, and labs are quite good. Maximum machines in labs are old and rough. The canteen is okay, but little costly. The mess on the campus is big and good, but the food provided lacks nutrition and taste.

reviews.review_heading: Little bit satisfied. The teachers was good but less placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average and good. The college campus was not Wi-Fi enabled, but the hostel was Wi-Fi enabled. The labs and the library are good. The medical facilities are provided for the hostel students but only first-aid. The sports and games facilities were fine in the college. Every year the college organises the annual festival where all indoor and outdoor games were held. The classrooms are good, and some rooms also have the projector for the presentation purpose. The food provided ...

reviews.review_heading: Good college to join for quality education and try to maintain good score for the placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The college has labs, classrooms, library, conference Hall, placement cell, and grounds for each sport are maintained properly, except auditorium. The facilities like Wi-Fi, water-cooler, geyser, gym, cleaning rooms was maintained properly in the hostel, as well as rooms are quite big accompanied by wardrobe, tables, chairs, bed mattress per individual.

reviews.review_heading: Simply the best college in Delhi NCR - faculty-wise, study-wise and facility-wise.
reviews.review_text: In the infrastructure, not a single thing can be rated as poor. There is a cafeteria, separate hostels, hygienic washrooms, many labs, and different seminar halls for respective departments. Also, there is a lot of greenery. Everything is appreciable including the Wi-Fi, the hostel and, various hygienic foods on various days.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2017, really good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text:
It has Wi-Fi on the campus.
There are four hostels in which two are for girls and two for boys.
Hostels have 24-hours Wi-Fi.
There are well-maintained classrooms for engineering students.
There is a library for all students. They can issue any book for 14 days.
It has medical facilities with an emergency ambulance.
There are different types of playgrounds for football, cricket, racket, kabaddi, basketball, etc.
Good quality food is served in hostels.

The college has a brand name of Raj Kumar Goel Group, but the facilities we got were not up to the mark. As far as training and placement activities are concerned, there were very few companies and most companies were BPOs (the major placement was in GENPACT). I was in the 5th batch of the college, but now the things have changed and faculty team has changed. New initiatives have been taken in all the areas here. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good infrastructure, but it is average for students future.

review_content.Placements: Placements is a huge problem in this college as top recruiting companies don't visit this college for placements. Approximately 30% of the students get placements after completing engineering. Mostly the highest salary package is not offered to any student in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The building is superb, and the ground is huge. Our college atmosphere is nice, but much games and sports equipment is not available. The canteen is average, and there are medical facilities in our college. Classrooms and library are fantastic here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty members are good, but the management is not good.

review_content.Placements: I was studying in this college from 2013 to 2017, but there were no placement opportunities provided here. The college conducted visits to different plants like Kadana, Vanakbori, Indo-German, and CIPET, etc. The HOD of the mechanical department Mr M. B. Diwan sir is very good. All other staff members were supportive during my engineering course. They always provided industrial experience and shared their knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college was not good. It was just like a jail. However, the workshop is very good. The members of the workshop are very supportive and encourage to learn about new machines. But the college management is bad. The administrative staff members were very rude.

individual_reviews.title: There are no facilities, no placement, and no job.

content.Infrastructure: College has the worst infrastructure. Most of the time computer labs were out of internet connection or having too slow internet connectivity. answer.text: Dr. Paul Raj Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This is the worst institution you can ever select.

review_content.Placements: If you are in mechanical engineering here, you might get placed in a carburettor manufacturing company without any proper interview, just for the sake of the company. You have to work 8 hours a day, standing which causes health issues.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel is clean. The canteen is unhygienic with wasp nets all over the place. The only thing good food you can eat here is the egg puffs. All other foods are bad, and the staff there are rude to all students. When there is a visit from higher officials, you can see the canteen as shiny as granite.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Thanjavur.

review_content.Placements: About 75-84% of students in our course got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. Companies like Bharat Petroleum, Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited and L&T visited our campus for placements. Roles like the junior engineer is offered to the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers the best courses like civil, computer, mechanical, electrical communication and electronics engineering. The college provides good laboratory and classrooms. The college provides all the games like running, Jim, football, basketball, kabaddi, and cricket. There is a food specialist for cooking, and there offer varieties of dishes.

overview_faqs.question: Is PR Engineering College (PREC, Thanjavur) a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: PR Engineering College (PREC, Thanjavur) is a reputed institute for M.Sc., B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MCA. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Science, IT & Software, Engineering. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. PR Engineering College (PREC, Thanjavur) has a review rating of 3.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4 on campuslife, 2.9 on placements, 3.3 on faculty and 3.6 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: PR Engineering College (PREC,Thanjavur) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: PR Engineering College is a really good college.

content.Placements: PR Engineering College has good placement records, with almost 80-90% of students placed in core companies like TVS, Yamaha, Ashok Leyland, Mahindra, Hyundai, Ola, TCS, Zoho, and others. Students in the 7th and 8th semesters are eligible for campus interviews. The highest salary package is 9 LPA, while the lowest is 1.8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: PR Engineering College features spacious classrooms and has the largest library and laboratory facilities. The college also has an auditorium. There are separate hostels for boys and girls, and the hostel mess food is hygienic. However, sports ground facilities and medical facilities are limited.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college and provides good placements.

content.Placements: Our college provided good placements every year. India's most reputed companies like TVS, HCL, TCS, etc., visited our college to recruit students. The salary offered was Rs.15,000 to 1 LPM.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was beautiful. Our campus was fully enabled with free Wi-Fi and CCTV facilities. Many laboratories and a library were available. Hostel was cleanly maintained. Food served in the mess was tasty and hygienic.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were experienced and taught students very well. They conducted many practical classes so that students easily understand the lessons. All the students passed university exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: This is the worst institution you can ever select.

content.Placements: If you are in mechanical engineering here, you might get placed in a carburettor manufacturing company without any proper interview, just for the sake of the company. You have to work 8 hours a day, standing which causes health issues.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is clean. The canteen is unhygienic with wasp nets all over the place. The only thing good food you can eat here is the egg puffs. All other foods are bad, and the staff there are rude to all students. When there is a visit from higher officials, you can see the canteen as shiny as granite.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college in Thanjavur.

content.Placements: About 75-84% of students in our course got placed. The highest salary offered was Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. Companies like Bharat Petroleum, Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited and L&T visited our campus for placements. Roles like the junior engineer is offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers the best courses like civil, computer, mechanical, electrical communication and electronics engineering. The college provides good laboratory and classrooms. The college provides all the games like running, Jim, football, basketball, kabaddi, and cricket. There is a food specialist for cooking, and there offer varieties of dishes.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good for freedom education.

content.Placements: Getting placement is quite difficult. Every year campus interview will be arranged any few core companies only will hire you when you impress them in all ways. To get placement, training classes will be conducted for eight days per semester. Separate department has been formed to train the students for interview.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is quite good. Whole campus is covered by several kind of trees except playground only. Separate rest room facility is arranged for each floor. Purified drinking water supplied in each floor. Each Classroom will have four fans and tube lights.

faqs.question: Q: Is Lord Jegannath College of Engineering and Technology (LJCET) a known college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Lord Jegannath College of Engineering and Technology (LJCET) has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

review_content.Placements: About 25% of students are placed in mg course. The highest package was 70k/month and the lowest was 15k/month. The semester exams are somewhat difficult but have about 90 pass %.

Hostel food is 70% good. Hostel maintenance is perfect. College climate is also good and greenery. Sports and games are also there. There is no medical facility.

reviews.review_heading: College with good faculty, placemennts in 2023, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. We have a central library and a big playground. Our college conducts cultural events. We have separate labs. The hostel is good. We have a friendly warden and other friendly facilities. There are around 8 members per room. Good lockers are provided. Beds are also good. The food is good, clean, and hygienic. The warden is also friendly. Surroundings should be proper and cleaned daily. Solar power is also available for college only.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are average. The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, labs, and a library. The quality of the food is average. We can survive with food.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements but not freedom.
reviews.review_text: There are many laboratories in this college. Sports are not encouraged in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for every student and can be considered for a bright future.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. They provide pure drinking water, 24X7 library facilities with good resources, and computer labs with good computers. They serve food of very good quality. The campus is very eco-friendly. There is very high security, and good discipline is maintained throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and one can learn a lot from it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. The hostel is good, but we can't expect more for the fees we are paying. It would be better when compared to other colleges. Everything is fine when compared to other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: There is nothing bad about my college. The college and its management are good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. But we need to improve food quality. Students are trained well in sports and games. There is a separate sports wing to train students in different sporting aspects. We need a well-qualified, dynamic physical director to train the students in both indoor and outdoor games. It is a famous college in the Prakasam district. The infrastructure of the college is also very nice. It is very convenient with the timings of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best platform for your future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available here are an auditorium, central library, basketball court, tennis ground, Wi-Fi for every department, huge classrooms, central canteen, etc. The quality of food served is very good. In the canteen, a lot of varieties of food items are available. Medical facilities are provided on every floor.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied by joining this college because I got placed in an MNC company.
reviews.review_text: It provides pretty good facilities like a library and a parking place. For every department and lab, there is a separate Wi-Fi in it. Classrooms are good with a lot of windows and a projector. The hostel is very safe and secure, especially for girls. Mess food is good with non-vegetarian and vegetarian items. They cook different items every week. I think for sports there is no space for playing games like cricket, football, and basketball. There is a limited area for playing. There is one cantee...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have integrated labs and a 4-floor central library with a digital library facility. Labs are well-equipped with equipment and computers. They give more priority to labs. Every lab has two assistants to assist you, and they will clarify every doubt with detailed notes with politeness. The college provides library cards, so you can borrow the books from library and take them home. They don't charge a single rupee for books. Air-conditioners are available in the central library. In every compute...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the faculty members available in 2020.
reviews.review_text: I don't know about the hostel, but my friends told me that the food was average and sometimes good. However, the security of the hostel was very nice. They will take care of every student. They provide study hours and all medical facilities. They will provide sports and games for hostel students.
